message:
test(fcp-core): pin HealthState + BudgetStatus + SelfCheckStatus serde matrix (flywheel_connectors-ghver)

Bead asks for ManifestStatus variant Display + serde. fcp-core has no
type literally named ManifestStatus; the status-shaped surface
covers many enums most of which are already pinned (IntentStatus by
epymi, ProvisioningStatus by 6tcjg, DescriptorStatus by
live_status_serde_tag_matrix.rs, PrerequisiteStatus by nhms0,
OperationStatus by operation_status_serde_tags.rs). Three remaining
unpinned status classifiers:
- HealthState (health.rs:108) — 5-variant lifecycle status
  (Starting/Ready/Degraded/Error/Stopping) with internal `state` tag
  and lowercase rename. Closest "ManifestStatus" analogue.
- BudgetStatus (policy.rs:123) — 2 variants Ok/Exceeded with
  rename_all snake_case
- SelfCheckStatus (health.rs:110) — 4 variants Ok/Degraded/Failed/
  Unsupported with rename_all snake_case

Coverage:
- HealthState per-variant JSON tag pinned for unit variants
  (Starting/Ready/Stopping → {"state": "<lowercase>"}) and struct
  variants (Degraded/Error → {"state": "<...>", "reason": "..."}
  via internally-tagged flatten)
- JSON round-trip preserves variant + nested fields for all 5
  variants
- CBOR carries `state` discriminator for every variant via
  Value-inspection workaround for known Content-shim quirk on
  internally-tagged enums with nested struct payloads
- 5-variant declaration order pinned (starting/ready/degraded/
  error/stopping)
- PascalCase + unknown state rejected
- BudgetStatus per-variant JSON tag pinned (ok/exceeded), JSON +
  CBOR round-trip per variant, PascalCase + over_budget (wrong
  vocabulary) rejected
- SelfCheckStatus per-variant JSON tag pinned for all 4 variants
  (ok/degraded/failed/unsupported), JSON + CBOR round-trip per
  variant, PascalCase + missing (wrong vocabulary) rejected
- Cross-enum: `degraded` token shared by intentional design
  across HealthState + SelfCheckStatus (each lives in its own
  field, dashboards distinguish by source)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
